new_nodes.title: Illyrio's ruby chain
aliases: the three rubies on a chain of black iron
new_nodes.why: Illyrio's gift to Aegon worn at the reveal — three square-cut rubies on black iron, 'Red and black. Dragon colors.' Iconic dragon-colors object; GIFTED_TO + OWNS anchor.

new_nodes.title: Varys's crossbow
aliases: the crossbow that killed Kevan Lannister
new_nodes.why: The weapon Varys uses to kill Kevan in the ADWD epilogue. Distinct from tywins-crossbow (ASOS). Varys names the parallel ('the crossbow fitting... you shared so much with Lord Tywin').

new_nodes.title: Kevan Lannister reconciles the realm
aliases: Kevan Lannister's stabilization of the realm
new_nodes.why: BORDERLINE / flag-for-verify: Kevan's on-page regency project (reconcile Highgarden + Casterly Rock, bind the Faith, unite under Tommen) — the thing the assassinations PREVENT. Mints ONLY to resolve the assassinations 0-outgoing dead-end. Fresh-verify: is this over-reach / re-modeling KL politics? Drop if so.

dropped_at_synthesis: varys DISGUISED_AS rugen — no clean in-scope BOOK anchor (Rugen-as-Varys is ACOK/ASOS, not in the AEGON chapters); the epilogue quotes never name Rugen. → pass-2 (needs ACOK anchor).

varys MANIPULATES aegon (shaped his upbringing) — MANIPULATES qualifier enum (bribe/flattery/false-info/threat/seduction) has no fit for 'groomed for rule'; Aegon is not 'unknowingly used'. Captured as harvest quote on aegon node instead.
varys DECEIVES kevan-lannister (15-yr concealment) — contradicts/overlaps varys REVEALS_TO kevan (the terminal disclosure); the realm-deception has no clean person target. Kept REVEALS_TO.
jon-connington DECEIVES golden-company (re greyscale) — second same-endpoint DECEIVES; greyscale concealment captured by AFFLICTED_BY + harvest. Kept the identity DECEIVES.
jon-connington DISGUISED_AS griff — no `griff` node (it's an alias on jon-connington).
haldon/rolly-duckfield CREW_OF shy-maid — passengers, not boat crew (kept yandry CAPTAIN_OF + ysilla CREW_OF, the actual owners/operators).
lemore/strickland PARTICIPATES_IN siege + duckfield siege — thin; kept aegon COMMANDS_IN siege (the load-bearing 'I mean to lead it').
franklyn-flowers/marq-mandrake/gorys-edoryen PARTICIPATES_IN reveal — each wired via their stronger COMMANDS_IN-a-taking role instead (avoids redundant reveal-padding).
black-balaq COMMANDS_IN taking-of-griffins-roost — kept the landing-hub COMMANDS_IN (more central) over the griffins-roost one.

edges.quote: The nail on his middle finger had turned as black as jet
edges.note: FIRST-USE of AFFLICTED_BY in graph (0 instances). The arc's death-clock. Infection vector = pulling Tyrion from the Rhoyne during the stone-men attack (adwd-tyrion-06:21).

edges.quote: Death, he knew, but slow. I still have time.
edges.note: The death-clock drives his haste; routes through the actor (jon-connington MOTIVATES siege already exists) — parallels maggy-the-frogs-prophecy MOTIVATES cersei. Not greyscale MOTIVATES siege (agency-collapse).

edges.quote: We want no songs about the gallant exile
edges.note: Varys plants the false thief/drunk disgrace story re Connington to suppress heroic-exile songs + protect the conspiracy.

edges.quote: Aegon has been shaped for rule since before he could walk
edges.note: The terminal lift of the 15-yr concealment — Varys reveals Aegon's SURVIVAL (on-page fact, NOT identity) to dying Kevan, who cannot act on it.

edges.quote: Even the men who'd ridden with him might not recognize the exile lord Jon Connington
edges.note: Connington enacts the cover — presents as the sellsword 'Griff'; the GC believes Connington drank himself to death in Lys.

edges.quote: My lords, I give you Aegon Targaryen, firstborn son of Rhaegar
edges.note: JonCon performs the reveal — ends his 15-yr concealment.

edges.quote: Then put your hopes on me
edges.note: Aegon speaks at the war council; the subject of the reveal.

edges.quote: The last to do so was Homeless Harry Strickland
edges.note: Captain-general presides at the council; reluctantly lays his sword last.

edges.quote: we are your men
edges.note: Asks Aegon the deciding sail-west question.

edges.quote: some of us still have friends in the Reach
edges.note: Speaks at the council in support of sailing west.

edges.quote: the Targaryen girl has not started for the west
edges.note: GC spymaster; opens the intelligence briefing that frames the vote.

edges.quote: One broken contract is stain enough upon the honor of the company
edges.note: Strickland's caution given an event target — argues against the westward sail.

edges.quote: offers twice what Myr was paying us
edges.note: The Yunkai envoy's contract offer Strickland 'would think on' — engaged but never concluded; the sellsword-market context Aegon overrides.

edges.quote: And quick as that, Griffin's Roost was his again
edges.note: JonCon personally leads the column on his own seat.

edges.quote: Franklyn Flowers was able to use the brush for concealment and lead his men within twenty yards of the gates
edges.note: Leads the ground/ram assault at Griffin's Roost.

edges.quote: Ser Tristan Rivers had set off simultaneously for the seat of House Morrigen at Crow's Nest
edges.note: Commands the Crow's Nest column.

edges.quote: Laswell Peake for Rain House, the stronghold of the Wyldes
edges.note: Commands the Rain House column.

edges.quote: He's taken Greenstone
edges.note: Commands the accidental Estermont/Greenstone column (Volantenes put him ashore on the wrong isle).

edges.quote: under the command of the company's Volantene paymaster, Gorys Edoryen
edges.note: Commands the landing camp / rear guard while the columns fan out (he also GUARDS landing — this is the command role).

edges.quote: Black Balaq commanded one thousand bows
edges.note: GC archer-command, operationally central to every taking; lights balaq from the landing hub.

edges.quote: I mean to lead it
edges.note: Aegon insists on personally leading the Storm's End assault over JonCon's objection — major character beat.

edges.quote: a pair of Dornish orphans come home to Mother Rhoyne
edges.note: Poles the Shy Maid the full Rhoyne journey with Aegon hidden aboard.

edges.quote: Ysilla had the tiller
edges.note: Steers the Shy Maid throughout the journey; mothers the household.

edges.quote: Haldon corrected their mistakes
edges.note: Aegon's teacher aboard the Shy Maid (already TUTORS; this is the journey co-presence).

edges.quote: Young Griff went off with Septa Lemore to be instructed in the mysteries of the Faith
edges.note: His septa/Faith tutor + guardian on the journey (already TUTORS/GUARDS/PROTECTS).

edges.quote: Time to raise some bruises. Swords today, I think.
edges.note: Aegon's sworn shield/companion aboard.

edges.quote: Before them went Ser Rolly Duckfield, a snow-white cloak streaming from his shoulders
edges.note: Named Kingsguard (white cloak) — Aegon's sworn protector. rolly-duckfield had 0 edges to aegon.

edges.quote: Ser Rolly's greater size and strength would quickly overwhelm his charge
edges.note: Trains Aegon at arms daily aboard the Shy Maid.

edges.quote: three huge square-cut rubies on a chain of black iron, a gift from Magister Illyrio
edges.note: via illyrios-ruby-chain. Giver->recipient per live GIFTED_TO convention. 'Red and black. Dragon colors.'

edges.quote: At his throat he wore three huge square-cut rubies on a chain of black iron
edges.note: Wears the chain at the reveal.

edges.quote: Yandry took them out into the center of the river
edges.note: Greenblood-born owner/operator of the poleboat (target is object.artifact vessel).

edges.quote: Ysilla had the tiller
edges.note: Steers/cooks; the boat's day-to-day operator.

edges.quote: clutching a crossbow in soft powdered hands
edges.note: Varys holds the crossbow in Pycelle's chambers before/after killing Kevan.

edges.quote: clutching a crossbow in soft powdered hands
edges.note: The weapon used in the assassination event.

edges.quote: I thought the crossbow fitting. You shared so much with Lord Tywin, why not that?
edges.note: Both Lannister patriarchs (Tywin / his brother Kevan) crossbow-killed by an intimate; Varys names the echo explicitly.

edges.quote: to reconcile Highgarden and Casterly Rock, bind the Faith to your little king
edges.note: Resolves the assassinations 0-outgoing dead-end. The murder cuts short Kevan's stabilization = the realm-chaos Varys wants for Aegon. FLAG: borderline re-modeling KL politics?

edges.quote: to reconcile Highgarden and Casterly Rock, bind the Faith to your little king
edges.note: Kevan as Lord Regent is the agent of the reconciliation project.
